title: Hellerorchis gomezoides
taxonomy: Hellerorchis gomezoides is classified within the family Orchidaceae, specifically within the subfamily Cranichidoideae. This species belongs to the genus Hellerorchis. The classification of Hellerorchis gomezoides is further divided into the tribe Goodyerinae. Hellerorchis gomezoides is native to China and was first described in the year 2015. Its classification places it among the terrestrial orchids, which are characterized by their underground storage organs.
